headline: Builders FirstSource (BLDR): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: What a brutal six months it’s been for Builders FirstSource. The stock has dropped 22.7% and now trades at $80.20, rattling many shareholders. This might have investors contemplating their next move.
